The Prairie Development Co. has
disposed of a lot 50x71 feet at the
northeast corner of Second avenue
and Washington street to Mike
Lang for $27,500. He will improve
the property. Mr.. Lang is the own
er of the Hale hotel building on
Riverside avenue. purchased from
Young & Zann for 100000.


Plans fro a steel viaduct at Olive
avenue and Napa street have been
filed by the o. r. & N. for the ap-
prevail of the city council The road
agrees to bear the expense of build.
ing the viaduct, but asks the city to
grade the streets underneath and
the approaches, and lay the walks,
Or. Frank w. HiIscher, who was
fined $50 for contempt of court the
other day for taking his boy from
the custody of the mother, has been
ordered to show why he has not
paid $3.50 attorneys fees which
were ordered in the divorce decree
